feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Buckley School of Later Life Sexual Education
entry.summary:
Author: AsperJasper

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,754Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 0

Summary: When they land on the couch, beers in hand, Eddie’s face almost hurts from smiling. He’d known that he missed this, but hadn’t realized how much until he doesn’t have to miss it anymore.“Oh! I have a surprise for you,” Buck says out of nowhere, cutting himself off in the middle of a sentence about his neighbor’s ugly garden decor. His smile, which had been bright and easy a second ago, turns sharp and teasing, and Eddie knows that Buck is about to do something stupid. “I was bored this afternoon.” He turns on the TV and starts fiddling with his phone. Eddie knows it’s going to be something ridiculous and over the top, because it’s Buck, but he absolutely is not prepared for what pops up on the TV when Buck connects his phone.“Jesus Christ, Buck.”Buck has the audacity to laugh in Eddie’s, now flaming red, face.“Sex education is important!” He says cheerfully. “Ahem. Pay attention, there’s a quiz at the end!”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Needle And The Thread
entry.summary:
Author: Franandblueberries

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,082Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: “Don’t do that to me,” he said quietly. He sounded so broken. Eddie wanted to built him back up. “Don’t you love me anymore?” Eddie slurred. … Or, Buck and Eddie need to learn how to be friends after they break up.

entry.title: Once upon a Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,304Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: A prince searching for his mystery dancer is one thing. A prince searching for a single father with a five-year-old son, an overprotective sister, and a fairy godmother with questionable methods is quite another.

entry.title: Magic to Harm, Magic to Protect
entry.summary:
Author: Duochanfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,454Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 366

Summary: Buck has had magic since he was almost seven years old. He's been able to use it to protect himself and others. In his line of work, it's a blessing to be able to use it. While his relationship with Eddie begins to deepen, his one with Maddie sours more and more as she uses her Enchanted Voice to manipulate those around her into getting her own way.

entry.title: End of the Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: NocturneIgnis00

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,419Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: For a long time, Eddie Díaz felt like he was completely standing still. Caught in a ghost town of his own past, he found himself wandering through a maze of his own suffocating emotions. And just like everything else in his life, it all inevitably led back to Buck. To the piercing blue of his eyes. To the raw warmth of his joyful smile. Eddie knows he cannot afford to lose him—and he is willing to do whatever it takes to keep him safe, even if it costs him his own life.***Set after Season 9. When Eddie is critically injured during a catastrophic rescue operation, Buck is forced to navigate the harrowing wreckage of the aftermath, realizing that a universe without Eddie is a reality he is completely unequipped to face.***English is not my first language, but I am trying my absolute best with this story! I really hope you guys enjoy it. Comments and kudos are always highly appreciated! <3

entry.title: Full House
entry.summary:
Author: Im_Not_A_Sourwolf

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,465Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 126

Summary: “Uh… hey” Buck said slowly, like he was approaching a really wounded animal. “What’s going on?”. Eddie found his voice. It came out strangled. “Buck, please don’t freak out, but…” “Too late” Buck said immediately. His eyes were locked on the toddler. The kid’s face was turned into his mom’s leg, but Buck could still see part of him, he looked like…. Buck’s brain, which had been through fires, explosions, a tsunami, shootings, a lightning strike, a coma, almost literal hell, decided to take the worst possible route. Or The Buckley-Diaz family expands in the most craziest way possible.

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,254Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 49

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: what if the way you hold me (is actually what's holy)
entry.summary:
Author: devilsbuckley

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,050Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 13

Summary: Evan Buckley is trapped in a suffocating relationship with a terrible girlfriend, using baking at Bobby's diner as his only escape. But when a handsome, deeply closeted new doctor named Eddie Diaz walks in and orders a slice of peach cobbler, Buck's recipe for survival gets completely thrown out the window. OR: The one where Buck bakes pies to cope, Eddie is suffocating in comphet, and they accidentally fall ridiculously in love while ruining a perfectly good medical chart.

entry.title: All the Space Between - Buddie FF
entry.summary:
Author: Felix_brownieboy_lix

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,218Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Buck and Eddie are best friends, partners at the 118, and the kind of close that everyone around them has quietly accepted as it's own category. Buck is out of the closet and is dating Tommy, while Eddie is dating Marisol. Everything looks fine. Doesn't it? Tommy and Marisol see the way that Buck and Eddie gravitate towards each other but they are just friends... Right?

entry.title: Somebody Had To
entry.summary:
Author: budding

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,966Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 37

Summary: Buck wakes up with a cold on the worst possible morning. Eddie’s promotional exam is tomorrow, Christopher is sick at college, childcare falls through, and someone has to stay home with Theo. Buck insists he’s fine. Eddie lets himself believe it. Somehow Eddie gets distracted enough that he forgets Buck always puts everybody else first. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Married buddie

entry.title: I Don't Think It's Very Strange (For Me to Be in Love With You)
entry.summary:
Author: funnyfeelingbuckley

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,425Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 109

Summary: “Hear me out,” The man puts his hands out as a gesture of good faith, “This isn’t a prank. Well, maybe it is a prank…” Buck narrows his eyes and crosses his arms over his mostly bare pecs; the only thing covering his upper half is two suspenders. Buck, feeling a bit exposed and rather embarrassed, puffs out his chest in an attempt to intimidate. He watches as the man’s eyes roam over the broad expanse of his shoulders, and then to his biceps, and then back up to Buck’s face. The man licks his lips. Oh. “This isn’t that kind of prank,” The man manages, his voice tight. - or, Pretty Woman AU   title based on the song Show Me Your Soul by the Red Hot Chili Peppers, as found on the Pretty Woman soundtrack

entry.title: A Car
entry.summary:
Author: StiltedBreathing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,558Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: “I think I’m being haunted,” Buck says, frighteningly not for the first time.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: you're so so pretty boy (i'm paranoid i made you up)
entry.summary:
Author: bxrchie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,645Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 191

Summary: Eddie looks so peaceful like this. One arm under the pillow, his hair falling over his forehead, the moonlight bouncing off of his back while the sheets pool down at his waist. Yes, Eddie is asleep and Buck is staring at him like a creep. or Buck and Eddie are back living together, and Chris and Theo do a little meddling.

entry.title: Welcome Home
entry.summary:
Author: Dandeliam

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,036Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 75

Summary: Eddie supports Buck in the aftermath of Connor and Kameron’s crash. Buck learns what home really feels like.
